    3. Python 中的卡尔曼滤波与贝叶斯滤波 07-卡尔曼滤波的数学原理.ipynb

Table of Contents  目录

Kalman Filter Math  卡尔曼滤波算法¶

In [1]:  在[1]中：
%matplotlib inline
In [2]:  在[2]中：
#format the book
import book_format
book_format.set_style()
Out[2]:  Out[2]：

If you've gotten this far I hope that you are thinking that the Kalman filter's fearsome reputation is somewhat undeserved. Sure, I hand waved some equations away, but I hope implementation has been fairly straightforward for you. The underlying concept is quite straightforward - take two measurements, or a measurement and a prediction, and choose the output to be somewhere between the two. If you believe the measurement more your guess will be closer to the measurement, and if you believe the prediction is more accurate your guess will lie closer to it. That's not rocket science (little joke - it is exactly this math that got Apollo to the moon and back!).
如果你已经读到了这里，那么我希望你能够意识到：卡尔曼滤波器的“可怕名声”其实有些名不实。当然，我确实对一些公式进行了简化处理，但希望你的实现过程相当简单。其基本原理其实很简单——只需获取两次测量数据，或者一次测量数据加上一次预测值，然后选择输出值介于这两个数值之间的某个值。如果你更相信测量数据，那么你的预测值就会更接近实际值；而如果你认为预测值更准确，那么你的预测值就会更接近该预测值。这根本不是什么复杂的数学问题嘛（开玩笑的——正是这种数学方法让阿波罗飞船成功登月并返回）。

To be honest I have been choosing my problems carefully. For an arbitrary problem designing the Kalman filter matrices can be extremely difficult. I haven't been too tricky, though. Equations like Newton's equations of motion can be trivially computed for Kalman filter applications, and they make up the bulk of the kind of problems that we want to solve.
说实话，我一直在仔细挑选自己要解决的问题。对于某些复杂的难题来说，设计卡尔曼滤波器所需的矩阵会极其困难。不过，我并没有选择太复杂的题目。像牛顿运动定律这样的方程，在卡尔曼滤波器的应用中很容易计算出来。而这些方程，正是我们想要解决的大部分问题的核心内容。

I have illustrated the concepts with code and reasoning, not math. But there are topics that do require more mathematics than I have used so far. This chapter presents the math that you will need for the rest of the book.
我用代码和逻辑来阐释这些概念，而非数学公式。不过，也有一些主题需要用到比我所使用的更多的数学知识。本章将介绍你在阅读本书其余内容时所需要的数学知识。

Modeling a Dynamic System
动态系统的建模¶

A dynamic system is a physical system whose state (position, temperature, etc) evolves over time. Calculus is the math of changing values, so we use differential equations to model dynamic systems. Some systems cannot be modeled with differential equations, but we will not encounter those in this book.
动态系统是一种其状态（位置、温度等）会随时间而变化的物理系统。微积分正是研究数值变化的数学工具，因此我们用微分方程来描述动态系统。不过，有些系统无法用微分方程来描述，但在本书中我们不会遇到这类系统。

Modeling dynamic systems is properly the topic of several college courses. To an extent there is no substitute for a few semesters of ordinary and partial differential equations followed by a graduate course in control system theory. If you are a hobbyist, or trying to solve one very specific filtering problem at work you probably do not have the time and/or inclination to devote a year or more to that education.
动态系统的建模其实是许多大学课程的内容。在某种程度上，没有任何东西可以替代几学期关于常微分方程和偏微分方程的学习，以及之后在控制系统理论方面的深入学习。如果你只是个业余爱好者，或者只是想解决工作中某个特定的过滤问题，那你很可能没有时间和精力去投入一年或更长时间来学习这些知识。

Fortunately, I can present enough of the theory to allow us to create the system equations for many different Kalman filters. My goal is to get you to the stage where you can read a publication and understand it well enough to implement the algorithms. The background math is deep, but in practice we end up using a few simple techniques.
幸运的是，我能够阐述足够的理论内容，从而帮助我们为各种不同的卡尔曼滤波器建立相应的系统方程。我的目标是让你们能够阅读相关文献，并充分理解其内容，进而能够实际应用这些算法。虽然相关的数学原理相当复杂，但实际上我们只需要运用一些简单的技巧即可。

This is the longest section of pure math in this book. You will need to master everything in this section to understand the Extended Kalman filter (EKF), the most common nonlinear filter. I do cover more modern filters that do not require as much of this math. You can choose to skim now, and come back to this if you decide to learn the EKF.
这是本书中涉及纯数学内容最长的部分。如果你想理解最常用的非线性滤波器——扩展卡尔曼滤波器，就必须掌握这一部分的所有内容。当然，我也介绍了些更现代的滤波器，这些滤波器不需要那么复杂的数学知识。你现在可以先跳过这一部分，如果以后决定要学习扩展卡尔曼滤波器，再回来阅读这部分内容。

We need to start by understanding the underlying equations and assumptions that the Kalman filter uses. We are trying to model real world phenomena, so what do we have to consider?
首先，我们需要了解卡尔曼滤波所依据的数学方程和各种假设。既然我们试图用数学模型来描述现实世界中的现象，那么究竟有哪些因素需要考虑呢？

Each physical system has a process. For example, a car traveling at a certain velocity goes so far in a fixed amount of time, and its velocity varies as a function of its acceleration. We describe that behavior with the well known Newtonian equations that we learned in high school.
每一个物理系统都遵循一定的规律。例如，以某种速度行驶的汽车，在固定的时间内会行驶一定的距离；而汽车的速度则取决于其加速度。我们用高中时学过的牛顿定律来描述这种行为。

vx=at=12at2+v0t+x0v=atx=12at2+v0t+x0

Once we learned calculus we saw them in this form:
一旦我们学会了微积分，就会以这种形式来理解它们：

v=dxdt,a=dvdt=d2xdt2v=dxdt,a=dvdt=d2xdt2

A typical automobile tracking problem would have you compute the distance traveled given a constant velocity or acceleration, as we did in previous chapters. But, of course we know this is not all that is happening. No car travels on a perfect road. There are bumps, wind drag, and hills that raise and lower the speed. The suspension is a mechanical system with friction and imperfect springs.
在典型的汽车跟踪问题中，我们需要根据恒定的速度或加速度来计算汽车行驶的距离，就像我们在前面几章中所做的那样。不过，实际上情况并非如此简单。没有哪辆汽车能在完全平坦的道路上行驶。道路上会有各种凹凸不平之处，还有风阻以及起伏不平的路面，这些都会影响汽车的速度。此外，汽车的悬挂系统也属于机械装置，其中存在摩擦力，而且弹簧也并非完美无缺。

Perfectly modeling a system is impossible except for the most trivial problems. We are forced to make a simplification. At any time tt we say that the true state (such as the position of our car) is the predicted value from the imperfect model plus some unknown process noise:
除了那些极其简单的问题之外，要完美地模拟一个系统是不可能的。我们不得不进行简化处理。在任何时候，我们可以认为，系统的真实状态（比如汽车的位置）其实是由不完美的模型所预测出的数值，再加上一些无法确定的随机噪声而已。

x(t)=xpred(t)+noise(t)x(t)=xpred(t)+noise(t)

This is not meant to imply that noise(t)noise(t) is a function that we can derive analytically. It is merely a statement of fact - we can always describe the true value as the predicted value plus the process noise. "Noise" does not imply random events. If we are tracking a thrown ball in the atmosphere, and our model assumes the ball is in a vacuum, then the effect of air drag is process noise in this context.
这并不意味着 noise(t)noise(t) 是一个可以通过分析方法推导出来的函数。这仅仅是一个事实陈述而已：我们总可以把真实值表示为预测值加上各种过程噪声。所谓“噪声”并不一定指随机事件。如果我们正在追踪在大气中飞行的球，而模型却假设球处于真空中，那么空气阻力的影响就属于这种“过程噪声”。

In the next section we will learn techniques to convert a set of higher order differential equations into a set of first-order differential equations. After the conversion the model of the system without noise is:
在下一节中，我们将学习如何将一组高阶微分方程转化为一组一阶微分方程。转换完成后，无噪声系统的相关模型如下：

x˙=Axx˙=Ax

AA is known as the systems dynamics matrix as it describes the dynamics of the system. Now we need to model the noise. We will call that ww, and add it to the equation.
AA 被称为系统动态矩阵，因为它能够描述系统的动态变化过程。现在，我们需要对噪声进行建模。我们将把噪声表示为 ww ，并将其加入方程式中。

x˙=Ax+wx˙=Ax+w

ww may strike you as a poor choice for the name, but you will soon see that the Kalman filter assumes white noise.
ww 这个名字看起来可能不太合适，但你会很快明白：卡尔曼滤波器其实是以白噪声作为假设条件的。

Finally, we need to consider any inputs into the system. We assume an input uu, and that there exists a linear model that defines how that input changes the system. For example, pressing the accelerator in your car makes it accelerate, and gravity causes balls to fall. Both are control inputs. We will need a matrix BB to convert uu into the effect on the system. We add that into our equation:
最后，我们需要考虑输入系统中的各种因素。我们假设存在某个输入值 uu ，并且存在一个线性模型来描述该输入值如何影响系统。例如，踩下汽车的油门会导致汽车加速；重力则使物体向下坠落。这些都是属于控制输入的例子。我们需要用矩阵 BB 来将输入值 uu 转化为对系统的影响。我们将这个矩阵加入我们的方程式中。

x˙=Ax+Bu+wx˙=Ax+Bu+w

And that's it. That is one of the equations that Dr. Kalman set out to solve, and he found an optimal estimator if we assume certain properties of ww.
就是这样。这就是卡尔曼博士试图解决的方程之一。如果我们假设 ww 具有某些特定的性质，那么他就能找到一个最优的估算方法。

State-Space Representation of Dynamic Systems
动态系统的状态空间表示¶

We've derived the equation
我们已经推导出了这个方程。

x˙=Ax+Bu+wx˙=Ax+Bu+w

However, we are not interested in the derivative of xx, but in xx itself. Ignoring the noise for a moment, we want an equation that recursively finds the value of xx at time tktk in terms of xx at time tk−1tk−1:
不过，我们并不关心 xx 的导数，而只关心 xx 本身。暂且忽略那些干扰因素，我们希望找到一个方程，能够根据在时间 tk−1tk−1 时的 xx 值，递归地计算出在时间 tktk 时的 xx 值。

x(tk)=F(Δt)x(tk−1)+B(tk)u(tk)x(tk)=F(Δt)x(tk−1)+B(tk)u(tk)

Convention allows us to write x(tk)x(tk) as xkxk, which means the the value of xx at the kthkth value of tt.
该约定允许我们将 x(tk)x(tk) 表示为 xkxk ，也就是说， xx 的值相当于 tt 在 kthkth 时的值。

xk=Fxk−1+Bkukxk=Fxk−1+Bkuk

FF is the familiar state transition matrix, named due to its ability to transition the state's value between discrete time steps. It is very similar to the system dynamics matrix AA. The difference is that AA models a set of linear differential equations, and is continuous. FF is discrete, and represents a set of linear equations (not differential equations) which transitions xk−1xk−1 to xkxk over a discrete time step ΔtΔt.
FF 是一种常见的状态转换矩阵。它之所以被如此命名，是因为它能够使状态在离散的时间步长之间进行转换。它与系统动态矩阵 AA 非常相似。两者的区别在于： AA 描述的是一组线性微分方程，属于连续型模型；而 FF 则是离散型模型，它描述的是一组线性方程（而非微分方程），这些方程使得状态在离散的时间步长 ΔtΔt 内从 xk−1xk−1 状态转换为 xkxk 状态。

Finding this matrix is often quite difficult. The equation x˙=vx˙=v is the simplest possible differential equation and we trivially integrate it as:
找到这个矩阵通常相当困难。方程 x˙=vx˙=v 是最简单的微分方程，我们很容易就能将其积分出来：

∫xk−1xkdx=∫0Δtvdt∫xk−1xkdx=∫0Δtvdt
xk−xk−1=vΔtxk−xk−1=vΔt
xk=vΔt+xk−1xk=vΔt+xk−1

This equation is recursive: we compute the value of xx at time kk based on its value at time k−1k−1. This recursive form enables us to represent the system (process model) in the form required by the Kalman filter:
这个方程具有递归性质：我们根据 k−1k−1 时刻 xx 的值来计算 kk 时刻 xx 的值。这种递归结构使得我们能够以卡尔曼滤波器所要求的形式来表示该系统（即过程模型）。

xk=Fxk−1=[10Δt1][xk−1x˙k−1]xk=Fxk−1=[1Δt01][xk−1x˙k−1]

We can do that only because x˙=vx˙=v is simplest differential equation possible. Almost all other in physical systems result in more complicated differential equation which do not yield to this approach.
我们能够做到这一点，是因为 x˙=vx˙=v 是最简单的微分方程。在物理系统中，几乎所有其他微分方程都更为复杂，因此无法用这种方法来求解。

State-space methods became popular around the time of the Apollo missions, largely due to the work of Dr. Kalman. The idea is simple. Model a system with a set of nthnth-order differential equations. Convert them into an equivalent set of first-order differential equations. Put them into the vector-matrix form used in the previous section: x˙=Ax+Bux˙=Ax+Bu. Once in this form we use of several techniques to convert these linear differential equations into the recursive equation:
状态空间方法在阿波罗计划期间开始流行起来，这主要要归功于卡尔曼博士的贡献。其基本原理很简单：用一组 n 阶微分方程来描述系统。将这些方程转化为等价的一阶微分方程组。然后将其转化为前一节中提到的向量-矩阵形式。一旦转换成这种形式后，就可以利用各种技术将这些线性微分方程转化为递推方程。

xk=Fxk−1+Bkukxk=Fxk−1+Bkuk

Some books call the state transition matrix the fundamental matrix. Many use ΦΦ instead of FF. Sources based heavily on control theory tend to use these forms.
有些书籍将状态转移矩阵称为“基本矩阵”。许多人使用 ΦΦ 来表示状态转移矩阵，而不是 FF 。那些以控制理论为基础的资料，通常也使用这两种表示方式。

These are called state-space methods because we are expressing the solution of the differential equations in terms of the system state.
这些方法被称为“状态空间法”，因为我们是用系统状态来表示微分方程的解的。

Forming First Order Equations from Higher Order Equations
从高阶方程推导出一阶方程¶

Many models of physical systems require second or higher order differential equations with control input uu:
许多物理系统的模型都需要包含控制输入项的二阶或更高阶微分方程。

andnydtn+an−1dn−1ydtn−1+⋯+a2d2ydt2+a1dydt+a0=uandnydtn+an−1dn−1ydtn−1+⋯+a2d2ydt2+a1dydt+a0=u

State-space methods require first-order equations. Any higher order system of equations can be reduced to first-order by defining extra variables for the derivatives and then solving.
状态空间方法需要一阶方程。任何更高阶的方程组都可以通过为导数引入额外的变量，进而将其转化为一阶方程来处理。

Let's do an example. Given the system x¨−6x˙+9x=ux¨−6x˙+9x=u find the equivalent first order equations. I've used the dot notation for the time derivatives for clarity.
我们来看一个例子。给定系统 x¨−6x˙+9x=ux¨−6x˙+9x=u ，请找出其等效的一阶方程。为便于理解，我使用了点号来表示时间导数。

The first step is to isolate the highest order term onto one side of the equation.
第一步是将方程中最高次项单独放在等式的一边。

x¨=6x˙−9x+ux¨=6x˙−9x+u

We define two new variables:
我们定义了两个新的变量：

x1(t)x2(t)=x=x˙x1(t)=xx2(t)=x˙

Now we will substitute these into the original equation and solve. The solution yields a set of first-order equations in terms of these new variables. It is conventional to drop the (t)(t) for notational convenience.
现在，我们将这些值代入原方程中并求解。求解后会得到一组以这些新变量为一元的一阶方程。为了方便表示，通常会省略 (t)(t) 符号。

We know that x˙1=x2x˙1=x2 and that x˙2=x¨x˙2=x¨. Therefore
我们知道 x˙1=x2x˙1=x2 的情况，也知道 x˙2=x¨x˙2=x¨ 的情况。因此

x˙2=x¨=6x˙−9x+u=6x2−9x1+ux˙2=x¨=6x˙−9x+u=6x2−9x1+u

Therefore our first-order system of equations is
因此，我们的一阶方程组为：

x˙1x˙2=x2=6x2−9x1+ux˙1=x2x˙2=6x2−9x1+u

If you practice this a bit you will become adept at it. Isolate the highest term, define a new variable and its derivatives, and then substitute.
只要稍加练习，你就能熟练掌握这种方法。首先找出最高次项，定义一个新的变量及其导数，然后再进行代入计算。

First Order Differential Equations In State-Space Form
状态空间形式下的一阶微分方程¶

Substituting the newly defined variables from the previous section:
将上一节中新定义的变量代入：

dx1dt=x2,dx2dt=x3,...,dxn−1dt=xndx1dt=x2,dx2dt=x3,...,dxn−1dt=xn

into the first order equations yields:
代入一阶方程后得到：

dxndt=1an∑i=0n−1aixi+1+1anudxndt=1an∑i=0n−1aixi+1+1anu

Using vector-matrix notation we have:
使用向量-矩阵表示法，我们有：

⎡⎣⎢⎢⎢⎢⎢⎢⎢dx1dtdx2dt⋮dxndt⎤⎦⎥⎥⎥⎥⎥⎥⎥=⎡⎣⎢⎢⎢⎢x˙1x˙2⋮x˙n⎤⎦⎥⎥⎥⎥=⎡⎣⎢⎢⎢⎢⎢00⋮−a0an10⋮−a1an01⋮−a2an⋯⋯⋱⋯00⋮−an−1an⎤⎦⎥⎥⎥⎥⎥⎡⎣⎢⎢⎢⎢x1x2⋮xn⎤⎦⎥⎥⎥⎥+⎡⎣⎢⎢⎢⎢⎢00⋮1an⎤⎦⎥⎥⎥⎥⎥u[dx1dtdx2dt⋮dxndt]=[x˙1x˙2⋮x˙n]=[010⋯0001⋯0⋮⋮⋮⋱⋮−a0an−a1an−a2an⋯−an−1an][x1x2⋮xn]+[00⋮1an]u

which we then write as x˙=Ax+Bux˙=Ax+Bu.
我们将其记作 x˙=Ax+Bux˙=Ax+Bu 。

Finding the Fundamental Matrix for Time Invariant Systems
求取时不变系统的基本矩阵¶

We express the system equations in state-space form with
我们将系统方程表示为状态空间形式。

x˙=Axx˙=Ax

where AA is the system dynamics matrix, and want to find the fundamental matrix FF that propagates the state xx over the interval ΔtΔt with the equation
其中， AA 表示系统动态矩阵。我们需要找到那个能够使状态 xx 在区间 ΔtΔt 内按照特定方程进行传播的基矩阵 FF 。

x(tk)=F(Δt)x(tk−1)x(tk)=F(Δt)x(tk−1)

In other words, AA is a set of continuous differential equations, and we need FF to be a set of discrete linear equations that computes the change in AA over a discrete time step.
换句话说， AA 是一组连续的微分方程；而 FF 则是一组离散的线性方程，其作用是计算在离散时间步长内 AA 的变化量。

It is conventional to drop the tktk and (Δt)(Δt) and use the notation
按照惯例，通常会省略 tktk 和 (Δt)(Δt) ，直接使用该符号来表示。

xk=Fxk−1xk=Fxk−1

Broadly speaking there are three common ways to find this matrix for Kalman filters. The technique most often used is the matrix exponential. Linear Time Invariant Theory, also known as LTI System Theory, is a second technique. Finally, there are numerical techniques. You may know of others, but these three are what you will most likely encounter in the Kalman filter literature and praxis.
一般来说，有三种常见的方法可以用来确定卡尔曼滤波器中的该矩阵。最常用的方法是矩阵指数法。另一种方法是线性时不变系统理论。此外，还有数值计算方法。你可能还知道其他方法，但在卡尔曼滤波器的相关文献和实际应用中，你最常遇到的就是这三种方法。

The Matrix Exponential  矩阵指数¶

The solution to the equation dxdt=kxdxdt=kx can be found by:
方程 dxdt=kxdxdt=kx 的解可以通过以下方法求得：

dxdt=kxdxx=kdt∫1xdx=∫kdtlogx=kt+cx=ekt+cx=ecektx=c0ektdxdt=kxdxx=kdt∫1xdx=∫kdtlog⁡x=kt+cx=ekt+cx=ecektx=c0ekt

When t=0t=0, x=x0x=x0. Substitute these to equation above.
当 t=0t=0 时， x=x0x=x0 。将这些值代入上述方程中。

x0=c0ek(0)x0=c01x0=c0x=x0ektx0=c0ek(0)x0=c01x0=c0x=x0ekt

Using similar math, the solution to the first-order equation
运用类似的数学方法，一阶方程的解也可以得到。

x˙=Ax,x(0)=x0x˙=Ax,x(0)=x0

where AA is a constant matrix, is
其中， AA 是一个常数矩阵。

x=eAtx0x=eAtx0

Substituting F=eAtF=eAt, we can write
将 F=eAtF=eAt 代入后，我们可以这样表示：

xk=Fxk−1xk=Fxk−1

which is the form we are looking for! We have reduced the problem of finding the fundamental matrix to one of finding the value for eAteAt.
这就是我们正在寻找的形式！我们把求出该矩阵的问题，简化为求出 eAteAt 的值的问题。

eAteAt is known as the matrix exponential. It can be computed with this power series:
eAteAt 被称为矩阵指数。它可以通过以下幂级数来计算：

eAt=I+At+(At)22!+(At)33!+...eAt=I+At+(At)22!+(At)33!+...

That series is found by doing a Taylor series expansion of eAteAt, which I will not cover here.
该级数是通过对方程 eAteAt 进行泰勒级数展开得到的，具体过程这里就不赘述了。

Let's use this to find the solution to Newton's equations. Using vv as a substitution for x˙x˙, and assuming constant velocity we get the linear matrix-vector form
让我们用这个方法来求解牛顿方程。用 vv 来代替 x˙x˙ ，并假设速度为常数，那么就可以得到线性矩阵-向量形式。

[x˙v˙]=[0010][xv][x˙v˙]=[0100][xv]

This is a first order differential equation, so we can set A=[0010]A=[0100] and solve the following equation. I have substituted the interval ΔtΔt for tt to emphasize that the fundamental matrix is discrete:
这是一个一阶微分方程，因此我们可以设定 A=[0010]A=[0100] 的值，然后解这个方程。我将 tt 替换为 ΔtΔt ，以此来强调该矩阵是离散的。

F=eAΔt=I+AΔt+(AΔt)22!+(AΔt)33!+...F=eAΔt=I+AΔt+(AΔt)22!+(AΔt)33!+...

If you perform the multiplication you will find that A2=[0000]A2=[0000], which means that all higher powers of AA are also 00. Thus we get an exact answer without an infinite number of terms:
如果你进行乘法运算，就会发现 A2=[0000]A2=[0000] 。这意味着 AA 的所有高次幂也都等于 00 。这样，我们就能得到一个确切的答案，而无需处理无穷多个项。

F=I+AΔt+0=[1001]+[0010]Δt=[10Δt1]F=I+AΔt+0=[1001]+[0100]Δt=[1Δt01]

We plug this into xk=Fxk−1xk=Fxk−1 to get
我们将其代入 xk=Fxk−1xk=Fxk−1 中，就能得到结果。

xk=[10Δt1]xk−1xk=[1Δt01]xk−1

You will recognize this as the matrix we derived analytically for the constant velocity Kalman filter in the Multivariate Kalman Filter chapter.
你会认出，这就是我们在“多元卡尔曼滤波”一章中，通过分析方法推导出的、用于恒速卡尔曼滤波的矩阵。

SciPy's linalg module includes a routine expm() to compute the matrix exponential. It does not use the Taylor series method, but the Padé Approximation. There are many (at least 19) methods to compute the matrix exponential, and all suffer from numerical difficulties[1]. You should be aware of the problems, especially when AA is large. If you search for "pade approximation matrix exponential" you will find many publications devoted to this problem.
SciPy 的 linalg 模块中包含了一个用于计算矩阵指数的函数。该函数没有使用泰勒级数法，而是采用了帕德近似法来计算矩阵指数。实际上，有多种方法可以用来计算矩阵指数，至少有 19 种方法。不过，所有这些方法都存在一定的数值计算难题[1]。如果你需要处理较大的矩阵指数，就必须注意这些问题。如果你搜索“帕德近似法与矩阵指数”的相关内容，会找到很多关于这个主题的学术论文。

In practice this may not be of concern to you as for the Kalman filter we normally just take the first two terms of the Taylor series. But don't assume my treatment of the problem is complete and run off and try to use this technique for other problem without doing a numerical analysis of the performance of this technique. Interestingly, one of the favored ways of solving eAteAt is to use a generalized ode solver. In other words, they do the opposite of what we do - turn AA into a set of differential equations, and then solve that set using numerical techniques!
实际上，你可能不必太担心这个问题。因为对于卡尔曼滤波器来说，我们通常只需要使用泰勒级数的前两项即可。不过，不要以为我对这个问题的处理已经完整了，就直接把这种技术应用到其他问题上，而不先对这种技术的性能进行数值分析。有趣的是，解决 eAteAt 问题的常用方法之一就是使用广义常微分方程求解器。换句话说，他们的做法与我们相反：他们把 AA 转化为一组微分方程，然后再用数值方法来求解这些方程！

Here is an example of using expm() to solve eAteAt.
以下是使用 expm() 来解决 eAteAt 的示例。

In [3]:  在[3]中：
import numpy as np
from scipy.linalg import expm

dt = 0.1
A = np.array([[0, 1], 
              [0, 0]])
expm(A*dt)
Out[3]:  输出[3]：
array([[1. , 0.1],
       [0. , 1. ]])

Time Invariance  时间不变性¶

If the behavior of the system depends on time we can say that a dynamic system is described by the first-order differential equation
如果系统的行为随时间而变化，那么可以说，该动态系统可以用一阶微分方程来描述。

g(t)=x˙g(t)=x˙

However, if the system is time invariant the equation is of the form:
不过，如果该系统是时不变的，那么该方程的形式如下：

f(x)=x˙f(x)=x˙

What does time invariant mean? Consider a home stereo. If you input a signal xx into it at time tt, it will output some signal f(x)f(x). If you instead perform the input at time t+Δtt+Δt the output signal will be the same f(x)f(x), shifted in time.
“时间不变”是什么意思呢？以家用音响为例。如果你在时间点 tt 向音响输入信号 xx ，那么音响会输出信号 f(x)f(x) 。而如果你在时间点 t+Δtt+Δt 进行输入操作，输出信号仍然会是 f(x)f(x) ，只不过时间上有所延迟而已。

A counter-example is x(t)=sin(t)x(t)=sin⁡(t), with the system f(x)=tx(t)=tsin(t)f(x)=tx(t)=tsin⁡(t). This is not time invariant; the value will be different at different times due to the multiplication by t. An aircraft is not time invariant. If you make a control input to the aircraft at a later time its behavior will be different because it will have burned fuel and thus lost weight. Lower weight results in different behavior.
一个反例就是 x(t)=sin(t)x(t)=sin⁡(t) 系统在 f(x)=tx(t)=tsin(t)f(x)=tx(t)=tsin⁡(t) 环境下的情况。该系统不具备时间不变性：由于存在与 t 的乘法运算，不同时间点的系统状态是不同的。飞机同样不具备时间不变性。如果你在稍后的时间对飞机进行控制操作，其行为将会有所不同，因为飞机在此期间会消耗燃料，从而导致重量减轻。重量减轻自然会影响到飞机的行为表现。

We can solve these equations by integrating each side. I demonstrated integrating the time invariant system v=x˙v=x˙ above. However, integrating the time invariant equation x˙=f(x)x˙=f(x) is not so straightforward. Using the separation of variables techniques we divide by f(x)f(x) and move the dtdt term to the right so we can integrate each side:
我们可以通过对等式的每一侧进行积分来求解这些方程。上面我已经演示了如何对时间不变系统 v=x˙v=x˙ 进行积分。不过，对时间不变方程 x˙=f(x)x˙=f(x) 进行积分则没那么简单。我们可以利用变量分离法，将等式两边同时除以 f(x)f(x) ，然后把 dtdt 项移到等式的右边，这样就可以对等式的每一侧分别进行积分了。

dxdt=f(x)∫xx01f(x)dx=∫tt0dtdxdt=f(x)∫x0x1f(x)dx=∫t0tdt

If we let F(x)=∫1f(x)dxF(x)=∫1f(x)dx we get
如果我们让 F(x)=∫1f(x)dxF(x)=∫1f(x)dx 这样做的话，就会得到……

F(x)−F(x0)=t−t0F(x)−F(x0)=t−t0

We then solve for x with
然后我们用该公式来求解 x 的值。

F(x)=t−t0+F(x0)x=F−1[t−t0+F(x0)]F(x)=t−t0+F(x0)x=F−1[t−t0+F(x0)]

In other words, we need to find the inverse of FF. This is not trivial, and a significant amount of coursework in a STEM education is devoted to finding tricky, analytic solutions to this problem.
换句话说，我们需要找到 FF 的逆函数。这并非易事，因此在 STEM 教育中，有相当多的教学内容都是用来探讨如何解决这个棘手的分析问题的。

However, they are tricks, and many simple forms of f(x)f(x) either have no closed form solution or pose extreme difficulties. Instead, the practicing engineer turns to state-space methods to find approximate solutions.
不过，这些其实都是些技巧而已。对于许多简单的 f(x)f(x) 问题来说，要么没有明确的解析解，要么解决起来极其困难。因此，实际工作中的工程师们通常会采用状态空间法来寻求近似解。

The advantage of the matrix exponential is that we can use it for any arbitrary set of differential equations which are time invariant. However, we often use this technique even when the equations are not time invariant. As an aircraft flies it burns fuel and loses weight. However, the weight loss over one second is negligible, and so the system is nearly linear over that time step. Our answers will still be reasonably accurate so long as the time step is short.
矩阵指数的优点在于：我们可以将其用于任何满足时间不变性的微分方程组。不过，即便方程组不满足时间不变性，我们也常常会使用这种技术。以飞机为例，飞机在飞行过程中会消耗燃料，从而导致重量减轻。不过，一秒钟内的重量变化可以忽略不计，因此在这一时间尺度上，该系统可视为线性系统。只要时间步长足够短，我们的计算结果仍然会相当准确。

Example: Mass-Spring-Damper Model
示例：质量-弹簧-阻尼器模型¶

Suppose we wanted to track the motion of a weight on a spring and connected to a damper, such as an automobile's suspension. The equation for the motion with mm being the mass, kk the spring constant, and cc the damping force, under some input uu is
假设我们想要追踪一个连接在弹簧和减震器上的物体的运动情况，比如汽车悬架中的部件。在某种输入信号的作用下，该物体的运动方程为：其中， mm 表示质量， kk 表示弹簧常数， cc 表示减震力。

md2xdt2+cdxdt+kx=umd2xdt2+cdxdt+kx=u

For notational convenience I will write that as
为了方便表示，我会将其写成这样。

mx¨+cx˙+kx=umx¨+cx˙+kx=u

I can turn this into a system of first order equations by setting x1(t)=x(t)x1(t)=x(t), and then substituting as follows:
我可以通过令 x1(t)=x(t)x1(t)=x(t) 为某个值，然后再进行相应的代入，从而将此问题转化为一个一阶方程组。

x1x2x˙2=x=x˙1=x¨1=x¨x1=xx2=x˙1x˙2=x¨1=x¨

As is common I dropped the (t)(t) for notational convenience. This gives the equation
和往常一样，为了方便表示，我省去了 (t)(t) 符号。这样就能得到这个方程式了。

mx˙2+cx2+kx1=umx˙2+cx2+kx1=u

Solving for x˙2x˙2 we get a first order equation:
求解 x˙2x˙2 后，我们得到一个一阶方程：

x˙2=−cmx2−kmx1+1mux˙2=−cmx2−kmx1+1mu

We put this into matrix form:
我们将其转化为矩阵形式：

[x˙1x˙2]=[0−k/m1−c/m][x1x2]+[01/m]u[x˙1x˙2]=[01−k/m−c/m][x1x2]+[01/m]u

Now we use the matrix exponential to find the state transition matrix:
现在，我们利用矩阵指数来求解状态转移矩阵：

Φ(t)=eAt=I+At+(At)22!+(At)33!+...Φ(t)=eAt=I+At+(At)22!+(At)33!+...

The first two terms give us
前两项的结果是：

F=[1−(k/m)tt1−(c/m)t]F=[1t−(k/m)t1−(c/m)t]

This may or may not give you enough precision. You can easily check this by computing (At)22!(At)22! for your constants and seeing how much this matrix contributes to the results.
这样做可能无法确保足够的精确度。你可以通过计算各个常量的 (At)22!(At)22! 值来验证这一点，从而了解该矩阵对最终结果的贡献程度。

Linear Time Invariant Theory
线性时不变理论¶

Linear Time Invariant Theory, also known as LTI System Theory, gives us a way to find ΦΦ using the inverse Laplace transform. You are either nodding your head now, or completely lost. I will not be using the Laplace transform in this book. LTI system theory tells us that
线性时不变理论，也被称为 LTI 系统理论，提供了一种利用拉普拉斯逆变换来求解 ΦΦ 的方法。现在，你可能已经明白了，或者仍然完全搞不懂。在这本书中，我不会使用拉普拉斯变换。LTI 系统理论告诉我们：

Φ(t)=L−1[(sI−A)−1]Φ(t)=L−1[(sI−A)−1]

I have no intention of going into this other than to say that the Laplace transform LL converts a signal into a space ss that excludes time, but finding a solution to the equation above is non-trivial. If you are interested, the Wikipedia article on LTI system theory provides an introduction. I mention LTI because you will find some literature using it to design the Kalman filter matrices for difficult problems.
我无意深入探讨这个话题，只想说：拉普拉斯变换将信号转换到一个与时间无关的域中。不过，要解出上述方程并非易事。如果您感兴趣，维基百科上关于线性时不变系统理论的条目可以提供一些入门信息。我提到线性时不变系统，是因为在某些文献中，人们会利用这一概念来设计卡尔曼滤波器矩阵，以解决各种复杂问题。

Numerical Solutions  数值解¶

Finally, there are numerical techniques to find FF. As filters get larger finding analytical solutions becomes very tedious (though packages like SymPy make it easier). C. F. van Loan [2] has developed a technique that finds both ΦΦ and QQ numerically. Given the continuous model
最后，还有一些数值方法可以用来求解 FF 。随着滤波器尺寸的增大，寻求解析解变得极为繁琐（不过像 SymPy 这样的工具可以简化这一过程）。C. F. van Loan[2]提出了一种数值方法，能够同时求解 ΦΦ 和 QQ 。当然，这一切都是基于连续模型来进行的。

x˙=Ax+Gwx˙=Ax+Gw

where ww is the unity white noise, van Loan's method computes both FkFk and QkQk.
其中， ww 表示单位白噪声。根据 van Loan 的方法，可以同时计算出 FkFk 和 QkQk 的值。

I have implemented van Loan's method in FilterPy. You may use it as follows:
我已经在 FilterPy 中实现了 van Loan 的方法。你可以按照以下方式来使用它：

from filterpy.common import van_loan_discretization

A = np.array([[0., 1.], [-1., 0.]])
G = np.array([[0.], [2.]]) # white noise scaling
F, Q = van_loan_discretization(A, G, dt=0.1)

In the section Numeric Integration of Differential Equations I present alternative methods which are very commonly used in Kalman filtering.
在“微分方程的数值积分”这一部分中，我介绍了几种在卡尔曼滤波中经常被使用的替代方法。

Design of the Process Noise Matrix
过程噪声矩阵的设计¶

In general the design of the QQ matrix is among the most difficult aspects of Kalman filter design. This is due to several factors. First, the math requires a good foundation in signal theory. Second, we are trying to model the noise in something for which we have little information. Consider trying to model the process noise for a thrown baseball. We can model it as a sphere moving through the air, but that leaves many unknown factors - ball rotation and spin decay, the coefficient of drag of a ball with stitches, the effects of wind and air density, and so on. We develop the equations for an exact mathematical solution for a given process model, but since the process model is incomplete the result for QQ will also be incomplete. This has a lot of ramifications for the behavior of the Kalman filter. If QQ is too small then the filter will be overconfident in its prediction model and will diverge from the actual solution. If QQ is too large than the filter will be unduly influenced by the noise in the measurements and perform sub-optimally. In practice we spend a lot of time running simulations and evaluating collected data to try to select an appropriate value for QQ. But let's start by looking at the math.
一般来说， QQ 矩阵的设计是卡尔曼滤波器设计中最困难的环节之一。造成这一困难的原因是多方面的。首先，相关的数学计算需要扎实的信号理论基础。其次，我们试图对那些我们知之甚少的现象进行建模。以投掷的棒球为例，我们可以将其视为在空气中运动的球体，但这一模型仍然存在许多未知因素：球的旋转和自旋衰减、有缝球的空气阻力系数、风和空气密度的影响等等。虽然我们可以为特定的过程模型建立精确的数学方程，但由于过程模型本身并不完整， QQ 的计算结果也必然不完整。这对卡尔曼滤波器的性能有着重要影响：如果 QQ 的值太小，滤波器会过度依赖其预测模型，从而导致预测结果与实际值相差甚远。而如果 QQ 的值……如果过滤器的尺寸过大，那么测量结果就会受到噪声的过度影响，从而导致性能不佳。在实际操作中，我们需要花费大量时间来进行模拟计算和数据分析，以确定合适的 QQ 值。不过，我们还是先从数学角度来分析这个问题吧。

Let's assume a kinematic system - some system that can be modeled using Newton's equations of motion. We can make a few different assumptions about this process.
假设我们有一个符合运动学规律的系统——也就是那种可以用牛顿运动定律来描述的系统。对于这个系统，我们可以做出几种不同的假设。

We have been using a process model of
我们一直使用的是这样的流程模型。

x˙=Ax+Bu+wx˙=Ax+Bu+w

where ww is the process noise. Kinematic systems are continuous - their inputs and outputs can vary at any arbitrary point in time. However, our Kalman filters are discrete (there are continuous forms for Kalman filters, but we do not cover them in this book). We sample the system at regular intervals. Therefore we must find the discrete representation for the noise term in the equation above. This depends on what assumptions we make about the behavior of the noise. We will consider two different models for the noise.
其中， ww 代表过程噪声。运动系统是连续的——其输入和输出可以在任意时间点发生变化。不过，我们所使用的卡尔曼滤波器是离散的（虽然卡尔曼滤波器也有连续形式，但本书不涉及这些内容）。我们需要以固定的时间间隔对系统进行采样。因此，我们必须为上述方程中的噪声项找到相应的离散表示形式。这取决于我们对噪声行为的假设。我们将考虑两种不同的噪声模型。

Continuous White Noise Model
连续白噪声模型¶

We model kinematic systems using Newton's equations. We have either used position and velocity, or position, velocity, and acceleration as the models for our systems. There is nothing stopping us from going further - we can model jerk, jounce, snap, and so on. We don't do that normally because adding terms beyond the dynamics of the real system degrades the estimate.
我们利用牛顿定律来模拟运动系统。在建立模型时，我们可以使用位置和速度作为参数，或者同时使用位置、速度和加速度。其实，我们完全可以进一步深入：还可以模拟系统的瞬时加速度、冲击力等因素。不过，通常我们不会这么做，因为引入超出系统实际运动规律的额外参数，只会降低模型的准确性。

Let's say that we need to model the position, velocity, and acceleration. We can then assume that acceleration is constant for each discrete time step. Of course, there is process noise in the system and so the acceleration is not actually constant. The tracked object will alter the acceleration over time due to external, unmodeled forces. In this section we will assume that the acceleration changes by a continuous time zero-mean white noise w(t)w(t). In other words, we are assuming that the small changes in velocity average to 0 over time (zero-mean).
假设我们需要对物体的位置、速度和加速度进行建模。我们可以假设，在每个离散的时间步长内，加速度都是恒定的。当然，系统中存在各种随机干扰，因此实际上加速度并非恒定不变。由于外部不可预测的力的作用，被追踪物体的加速度会随时间而发生变化。在本节中，我们假设加速度的变化是由连续的、均值为零的白噪声所引起的。换句话说，我们认为，速度的微小变化在时间上会相互抵消，其平均值仍为零。

Since the noise is changing continuously we will need to integrate to get the discrete noise for the discretization interval that we have chosen. We will not prove it here, but the equation for the discretization of the noise is
由于噪声是持续变化的，因此我们需要对其进行积分处理，从而得到所选离散时间间隔内的离散噪声值。这里就不详细证明这个过程了，不过，噪声离散化的公式如下：

Q=∫Δt0F(t)QcFT(t)dtQ=∫0ΔtF(t)QcFT(t)dt

where QcQc is the continuous noise. The general reasoning should be clear. F(t)QcFT(t)F(t)QcFT(t) is a projection of the continuous noise based on our process model F(t)F(t) at the instant tt. We want to know how much noise is added to the system over a discrete intervat ΔtΔt, so we integrate this expression over the interval [0,Δt][0,Δt].
其中， QcQc 表示连续噪声。其原理其实很直观。 F(t)QcFT(t)F(t)QcFT(t) 实际上是根据我们的过程模型 F(t)F(t) 在时刻 tt 时对连续噪声的投影。我们想要知道在某个离散的时间间隔 ΔtΔt 内，系统里增加了多少噪声。因此，我们需要在这个时间间隔 [0,Δt][0,Δt] 内对这一表达式进行积分。

We know the fundamental matrix for Newtonian systems is
我们知道，牛顿系统的基本矩阵为

F=⎡⎣⎢100Δt10Δt2/2Δt1⎤⎦⎥F=[1ΔtΔt2/201Δt001]

We define the continuous noise as
我们将连续噪声定义为：

Qc=⎡⎣⎢000000001⎤⎦⎥ΦsQc=[000000001]Φs

where ΦsΦs is the spectral density of the white noise. This can be derived, but is beyond the scope of this book. See any standard text on stochastic processes for the details. In practice we often do not know the spectral density of the noise, and so this turns into an "engineering" factor - a number we experimentally tune until our filter performs as we expect. You can see that the matrix that ΦsΦs is multiplied by effectively assigns the power spectral density to the acceleration term. This makes sense; we assume that the system has constant acceleration except for the variations caused by noise. The noise alters the acceleration.
其中， ΦsΦs 表示白噪声的频谱密度。虽然这个数值可以通过计算得出，但超出了本书的讨论范围。详细内容可参考关于随机过程的标准教材。在实际应用中，我们往往不知道噪声的频谱密度，因此这实际上是一个“工程参数”——我们需要通过实验来调整这个数值，以确保滤波器的性能符合预期。可以看出， ΦsΦs 所乘的矩阵实际上负责将功率谱密度分配给各个加速度分量。这是合理的：我们假设系统具有恒定的加速度，当然，噪声会对此造成影响。

We could carry out these computations ourselves, but I prefer using SymPy to solve the equation.
我们可以自己来进行这些计算，但我更愿意使用 SymPy 来解这些方程。

Qc=⎡⎣⎢000000001⎤⎦⎥ΦsQc=[000000001]Φs

In [4]:  在[4]中：
import sympy
from sympy import (init_printing, Matrix, MatMul, 
                   integrate, symbols)

init_printing(use_latex='mathjax')
dt, phi = symbols('\Delta{t} \Phi_s')
F_k = Matrix([[1, dt, dt**2/2],
              [0,  1,      dt],
              [0,  0,       1]])
Q_c = Matrix([[0, 0, 0],
              [0, 0, 0],
              [0, 0, 1]])*phi

Q = integrate(F_k * Q_c * F_k.T, (dt, 0, dt))

# factor phi out of the matrix to make it more readable
Q = Q / phi
MatMul(Q, phi)
Out[4]:  输出[4]：
⎡⎣⎢⎢⎢Δt520Δt48Δt36Δt48Δt33Δt22Δt36Δt22Δt⎤⎦⎥⎥⎥Φs[Δt520Δt48Δt36Δt48Δt33Δt22Δt36Δt22Δt]Φs

For completeness, let us compute the equations for the 0th order and 1st order equations.
为了完整性起见，让我们来计算一下 0 阶和 1 阶方程的解。

In [5]:  在[5]中：
F_k = Matrix([[1]])
Q_c = Matrix([[phi]])

print('0th order discrete process noise')
integrate(F_k*Q_c*F_k.T,(dt, 0, dt))

0th order discrete process noise
Out[5]:  输出[5]：
[ΔtΦs][ΔtΦs]
In [6]:  在[6]中：
F_k = Matrix([[1, dt],
              [0, 1]])
Q_c = Matrix([[0, 0],
              [0, 1]]) * phi

Q = integrate(F_k * Q_c * F_k.T, (dt, 0, dt))

print('1st order discrete process noise')
# factor phi out of the matrix to make it more readable
Q = Q / phi
MatMul(Q, phi)

1st order discrete process noise
Out[6]:  输出[6]：
[Δt33Δt22Δt22Δt]Φs[Δt33Δt22Δt22Δt]Φs

Piecewise White Noise Model
分段白噪声模型¶

Another model for the noise assumes that the that highest order term (say, acceleration) is constant for the duration of each time period, but differs for each time period, and each of these is uncorrelated between time periods. In other words there is a discontinuous jump in acceleration at each time step. This is subtly different than the model above, where we assumed that the last term had a continuously varying noisy signal applied to it.
另一种关于噪声的模型认为：在每个时间周期内，最高阶的项（比如加速度）是恒定的，但不同时间周期内的该值各不相同，而且各个时间周期内的数值之间没有相关性。换句话说，每个时间点上，加速度都会发生突变。这与之前的模型有所不同，因为在之前的模型中，我们假设最后一个项受到的是连续变化的噪声信号的影响。

We will model this as
我们将把这个问题建模为……

f(x)=Fx+Γwf(x)=Fx+Γw

where ΓΓ is the noise gain of the system, and ww is the constant piecewise acceleration (or velocity, or jerk, etc).
其中， ΓΓ 表示系统的噪声增益，而 ww 则表示那种恒定的分段式加速度（或速度、或急动度等）。

Let's start by looking at a first order system. In this case we have the state transition function
我们先来研究一阶系统。在这种情况下，我们有状态转移函数。

F=[10Δt1]F=[1Δt01]

In one time period, the change in velocity will be w(t)Δtw(t)Δt, and the change in position will be w(t)Δt2/2w(t)Δt2/2, giving us
在某个时间段内，速度的变化量为 w(t)Δtw(t)Δt ，位置的变化量为 w(t)Δt2/2w(t)Δt2/2 。

Γ=[12Δt2Δt]Γ=[12Δt2Δt]

The covariance of the process noise is then
该过程噪声的协方差则为

Q=E[Γw(t)w(t)ΓT]=Γσ2vΓTQ=E[Γw(t)w(t)ΓT]=Γσv2ΓT
.

We can compute that with SymPy as follows
我们可以用 SymPy 来计算，具体步骤如下：

In [7]:  在[7]中：
var = symbols('sigma^2_v')
v = Matrix([[dt**2 / 2], [dt]])

Q = v * var * v.T

# factor variance out of the matrix to make it more readable
Q = Q / var
MatMul(Q, var)
Out[7]:  输出[7]：
[Δt44Δt32Δt32Δt2]σ2v[Δt44Δt32Δt32Δt2]σv2

The second order system proceeds with the same math.
二阶系统也遵循同样的数学运算规则。

F=⎡⎣⎢100Δt10Δt2/2Δt1⎤⎦⎥F=[1ΔtΔt2/201Δt001]

Here we will assume that the white noise is a discrete time Wiener process. This gives us
在这里，我们假设白噪声是一个离散时间的维纳过程。这样一来，我们就可以得到……

Γ=⎡⎣⎢12Δt2Δt1⎤⎦⎥Γ=[12Δt2Δt1]

There is no 'truth' to this model, it is just convenient and provides good results. For example, we could assume that the noise is applied to the jerk at the cost of a more complicated equation.
这种模型并没有什么“真理”可言，它只是使用起来方便，而且能得到不错的结果而已。例如，我们可以假设噪声是加在加速度上的，不过这样一来，相应的方程就会变得更复杂。

The covariance of the process noise is then
该过程噪声的协方差则为

Q=E[Γw(t)w(t)ΓT]=Γσ2vΓTQ=E[Γw(t)w(t)ΓT]=Γσv2ΓT
.

We can compute that with SymPy as follows
我们可以用 SymPy 来计算，具体步骤如下：

In [8]:  在[8]中：
var = symbols('sigma^2_v')
v = Matrix([[dt**2 / 2], [dt], [1]])

Q = v * var * v.T

# factor variance out of the matrix to make it more readable
Q = Q / var
MatMul(Q, var)
Out[8]:  输出[8]：
⎡⎣⎢⎢⎢Δt44Δt32Δt22Δt32Δt2ΔtΔt22Δt1⎤⎦⎥⎥⎥σ2v[Δt44Δt32Δt22Δt32Δt2ΔtΔt22Δt1]σv2

We cannot say that this model is more or less correct than the continuous model - both are approximations to what is happening to the actual object. Only experience and experiments can guide you to the appropriate model. In practice you will usually find that either model provides reasonable results, but typically one will perform better than the other.
我们无法断言这种模型比连续模型更准确或更不准确——两者都只是对实际现象的近似描述而已。只有通过实践和实验，才能确定哪种模型更合适。在实际应用中，通常会发现两种模型都能给出合理的结果，但一般来说，其中一种模型的表现会更好一些。

The advantage of the second model is that we can model the noise in terms of σ2σ2 which we can describe in terms of the motion and the amount of error we expect. The first model requires us to specify the spectral density, which is not very intuitive, but it handles varying time samples much more easily since the noise is integrated across the time period. However, these are not fixed rules - use whichever model (or a model of your own devising) based on testing how the filter performs and/or your knowledge of the behavior of the physical model.
第二种模型的优点在于，我们可以用 σ2σ2 来描述噪声，而 σ2σ2 又可以与物体的运动情况以及我们预期的误差大小相关联。第一种模型则要求我们指定光谱密度，这种方式不太直观。不过，第一种模型在处理不同时间点的样本时更为方便，因为噪声是在整个时间范围内进行积分处理的。不过，这些并非固定不变的规则——你可以根据测试结果或对物理模型行为的了解，选择使用其中任何一种模型，或者自行设计一种模型。

A good rule of thumb is to set σσ somewhere from 12Δa12Δa to ΔaΔa, where ΔaΔa is the maximum amount that the acceleration will change between sample periods. In practice we pick a number, run simulations on data, and choose a value that works well.
一个不错的经验法则是：将 σσ 的值设定在 12Δa12Δa 到 ΔaΔa 之间。其中， ΔaΔa 表示加速度在各个采样周期之间的最大变化幅度。在实际操作中，我们会先选定一个数值，然后利用数据来进行模拟测试，最终选择那个效果最佳的数值。

Using FilterPy to Compute Q
使用 FilterPy 来计算 Q 值¶

FilterPy offers several routines to compute the QQ matrix. The function Q_continuous_white_noise() computes QQ for a given value for ΔtΔt and the spectral density.
FilterPy 提供了多种算法来计算 QQ 矩阵。 Q_continuous_white_noise() 函数可以根据给定的 ΔtΔt 值以及光谱密度来计算 QQ 。

In [9]:  在[9]中：
from filterpy.common import Q_continuous_white_noise
from filterpy.common import Q_discrete_white_noise

Q = Q_continuous_white_noise(dim=2, dt=1, spectral_density=1)
print(Q)

[[0.333 0.5  ]
 [0.5   1.   ]]
In [10]:  在[10]中：
Q = Q_continuous_white_noise(dim=3, dt=1, spectral_density=1)
print(Q)

[[0.05  0.125 0.167]
 [0.125 0.333 0.5  ]
 [0.167 0.5   1.   ]]

The function Q_discrete_white_noise() computes QQ assuming a piecewise model for the noise.
函数 Q_discrete_white_noise() 在假设噪声具有分段模型的前提下，计算出 QQ 的值。

In [11]:  在[11]中：
Q = Q_discrete_white_noise(2, var=1.)
print(Q)

[[0.25 0.5 ]
 [0.5  1.  ]]
In [12]:  在[12]中：
Q = Q_discrete_white_noise(3, var=1.)
print(Q)

[[0.25 0.5  0.5 ]
 [0.5  1.   1.  ]
 [0.5  1.   1.  ]]

Simplification of Q  Q 的简化处理¶

Many treatments use a much simpler form for QQ, setting it to zero except for a noise term in the lower rightmost element. Is this justified? Well, consider the value of QQ for a small ΔtΔt
许多处理方法对 QQ 采用了一种更为简单的处理方式：将其设置为零，仅在右下角的元素中保留一个噪声项。这种处理方式合理吗？那么，让我们来考虑一下，当 ΔtΔt 较小时， QQ 的值会是多少。

In [13]:  在[13]中：
import numpy as np

np.set_printoptions(precision=8)
Q = Q_continuous_white_noise(
    dim=3, dt=0.05, spectral_density=1)
print(Q)
np.set_printoptions(precision=3)

[[0.00000002 0.00000078 0.00002083]
 [0.00000078 0.00004167 0.00125   ]
 [0.00002083 0.00125    0.05      ]]

We can see that most of the terms are very small. Recall that the only equation using this matrix is
我们可以看到，大多数项的数值都非常小。请记住，唯一使用这个矩阵的方程就是……

P=FPFT+QP=FPFT+Q

If the values for QQ are small relative to PP then it will be contributing almost nothing to the computation of PP. Setting QQ to the zero matrix except for the lower right term
如果 QQ 的值相对于 PP 来说很小，那么它对 PP 的计算几乎没有任何贡献。可以将 QQ 设置为零矩阵，右下角那个元素除外。

Q=⎡⎣⎢00000000σ2⎤⎦⎥Q=[00000000σ2]

while not correct, is often a useful approximation. If you do this for an important application you will have to perform quite a few studies to guarantee that your filter works in a variety of situations.
虽然这种做法并不完全准确，但通常可以作为一种有效的近似方法。如果你要将这种方法应用于重要的场景中，那么就需要进行大量的测试，以确保该滤波器在各种情况下都能正常发挥作用。

If you do this, 'lower right term' means the most rapidly changing term for each variable. If the state is x=[xx˙x¨yy˙y¨]Tx=[xx˙x¨yy˙y¨]T Then QQ will be 6x6; the elements for both x¨x¨ and y¨y¨ will have to be set to non-zero in QQ.
如果你这样做的话，“右下角项”指的是每个变量中变化最快的那个数值。如果当前状态为 x=[xx˙x¨yy˙y¨]Tx=[xx˙x¨yy˙y¨]T ，那么 QQ 的值将为 6x6；而 x¨x¨ 和 y¨y¨ 中的各个元素都必须在 QQ 中被设置为非零值。

Stable Compution of the Posterior Covariance
后验协方差的稳定计算¶

I've presented the equation to compute the posterior covariance as
我已经给出了用于计算后验协方差的公式。

P=(I−KH)P¯P=(I−KH)P¯

and while strictly speaking this is correct, this is not how I compute it in FilterPy, where I use the Joseph equation
严格来说，这种计算方式是正确的。但在 FilterPy 中，我并不采用这种方式来计算，而是使用约瑟夫方程来进行计算。

P=(I−KH)P¯(I−KH)T+KRKTP=(I−KH)P¯(I−KH)T+KRKT

I frequently get emails and/or GitHub issues raised, claiming the implementation is a bug. It is not a bug, and I use it for several reasons. First, the subtraction (I−KH)(I−KH) can lead to nonsymmetric matrix results due to floating point errors. Covariances must be symmetric, and so becoming nonsymmetric usually leads to the Kalman filter diverging, or even for the code to raise an exception because of the checks built into NumPy.
我经常收到邮件或 GitHub 上的反馈，声称这种实现方式存在错误。但实际上并非如此。我采用这种方式是有几个原因的。首先， (I−KH)(I−KH) 运算可能会导致结果矩阵不对称，这是由于浮点数运算的误差所导致的。而协方差矩阵必须是对称的，因此如果矩阵不对称，卡尔曼滤波器就会失效，或者因为 NumPy 中的检查机制而引发异常。

A traditional way to preserve symmetry is the following formula:
保持对称性的传统方法是使用以下公式：

P=(P+PT)/2P=(P+PT)/2

This is safe because σij=σjiσij=σji for all covariances in the matrix. Hence this operation averages the error between the differences of the two values if they have diverged due to floating point errors.
这是安全的，因为矩阵中所有协方差都为 σij=σjiσij=σji 。因此，如果由于浮点误差导致两个数值出现偏差，该操作会计算这两个数值之差的平均值，从而消除误差。

If you look at the Joseph form for the equation above, you'll see there is a similar ABATABAT pattern in both terms. So they both preserve symmetry. But where did this equation come from, and why do I use it instead of
如果你仔细观察上述方程中与 Joseph 相关的部分，会发现两项中都存在着类似的 ABATABAT 模式。因此，这两项都保持了对称性。不过，这个方程究竟从何而来呢？我为什么要使用它，而不是别的公式呢？

P=(I−KH)P¯P=(P+PT)/2P=(I−KH)P¯P=(P+PT)/2

Let's just derive the equation from first principles. It's not too bad, and you need to understand the derivation to understand the purpose of the equation, and, more importantly, diagnose issues if your filter diverges due to numerical instability. This derivation comes from Brown[4].
让我们从最基本的原则出发来推导这个方程吧。其实并不难。理解这个推导过程有助于我们明白该方程的用途。更重要的是，如果滤波器因为数值不稳定而出现异常，我们也能通过这个推导过程来找出问题所在。这个推导过程源自 Brown[4]的研究。

First, some symbology. xx is the true state of our system. x^x^ is the estimated state of our system - the posterior. And x¯x¯ is the estimated prior of the system.
首先，先来解释一下各种符号的含义。 xx 代表系统的真实状态。 x^x^ 则代表系统的估计状态，也就是后验概率。而 x¯x¯ 则代表系统的先验概率的估计值。

Given that, we can define our model to be
鉴于此，我们可以将模型定义为：

xk+1=Fkxk+wkzk=Hkxk+vkxk+1=Fkxk+wkzk=Hkxk+vk

In words, the next state xk+1xk+1 of the system is the current state kk moved by some process FkFk plus some noise wkwk.
换句话说，系统的下一个状态 xk+1xk+1 ，其实是当前状态 kk 经过某种过程 FkFk 处理后，再叠加上一些噪声 wkwk 所得到的结果。

Note that these are definitions. No system perfectly follows a mathematical model, so we model that with the noise term wkwk. And no measurement is perfect due to sensor error, so we model that with vkvk
请注意，这些只是定义而已。没有任何系统能够完全遵循数学模型，因此我们用噪声项 wkwk 来模拟这一情况。同样，由于传感器存在的误差，没有任何测量结果是完美的，所以我们用 vkvk 来模拟这一误差。

I'll dispense with the subscript kk since in the remainder of the derivation we will only consider values at step kk, never step k+1k+1.
我省略下标 kk 吧，因为在后续的推导过程中，我们只考虑步骤 kk 处的数值，而完全不考虑步骤 k+1k+1 处的数值。

Now we define the estimation error as the difference between the true state and the estimated state
现在，我们将估计误差定义为真实状态与估计状态之间的差异。

e=x−x^e=x−x^

Again, this is a definition; we don't know how to compute ee, it is just the defined difference between the true and estimated state.
这同样只是一种定义而已；我们不知道该如何计算 ee 的值，它只不过是真实状态与估计状态之间的差异罢了。

This allows us to define the covariance of our estimate, which is defined as the expected value of eeTeeT:
这使我们能够确定估计值的协方差。协方差被定义为 eeTeeT 的期望值：

P=E[eeT]=E[(x−x^)(x−x^)T]P=E[eeT]=E[(x−x^)(x−x^)T]

Next, we define the posterior estimate as
接下来，我们将后验估计定义为

x^=x¯+K(z−Hx¯)x^=x¯+K(z−Hx¯)

That looks like the equation from the Kalman filter, and for good reason. But as with the rest of the math so far, this is a definition. In particular, we have not defined KK, and you shouldn't think of it as the Kalman gain, because we are solving this for any problem, not just for linear Kalman filters. Here, KK is just some unspecified blending value between 0 and 1.
那看起来像是卡尔曼滤波器中的公式，这也合情合理。不过，和之前遇到的其他数学公式一样，这其实只是一个定义而已。具体来说，我们还没有给 KK 下定义；你也不应将其视为卡尔曼增益，因为我们在这里解决的是各种问题，而不仅仅是线性卡尔曼滤波器相关的问题。在这里， KK 只不过是介于 0 和 1 之间的某个未具体指定的数值罢了。

Now we have our definitions, let's perform some substitution and algebra.
现在我们已经有了相关的定义，接下来就来进行一些代入和代数运算吧。

The term (x−x^)(x−x^) can be expanded by replacing x^x^ with the definition above, yielding
术语 (x−x^)(x−x^) 可以通过用上述定义来替换 x^x^ 来进行展开，从而得到结果。

(x−x^)=x−(x¯+K(z−Hx¯))(x−x^)=x−(x¯+K(z−Hx¯))

Now we replace zz with Hx+vHx+v:
现在我们用 Hx+vHx+v 来替换 zz ：

(x−x^)=x−(x¯+K(z−Hx¯))=x−(x¯+K(Hx+v−Hx¯))=(x−x¯)−K(Hx+v−Hx¯)=(x−x¯)−KH(x−x¯)−Kv=(I−KH)(x−x¯)−Kv(x−x^)=x−(x¯+K(z−Hx¯))=x−(x¯+K(Hx+v−Hx¯))=(x−x¯)−K(Hx+v−Hx¯)=(x−x¯)−KH(x−x¯)−Kv=(I−KH)(x−x¯)−Kv

Now we can solve for PP if we note that the expected value of (x−x¯)(x−x¯) is the prior covariance P¯P¯, and that the expected value of vv is E[vvT]=RE[vvT]=R:
现在，如果我们注意到 (x−x¯)(x−x¯) 的期望值就是先验协方差 P¯P¯ ，而 vv 的期望值则是 E[vvT]=RE[vvT]=R ，那么我们就可以求出 PP 的值了：

P=E[[(I−KH)(x−x¯)−Kv)][(I−KH)(x−x¯)−Kv]T]=(I−KH)P¯(I−KH)T+KRKTP=E[[(I−KH)(x−x¯)−Kv)][(I−KH)(x−x¯)−Kv]T]=(I−KH)P¯(I−KH)T+KRKT

which is what we came here to prove.
这正是我们来到这里想要证明的。

Note that this equation is valid for any KK, not just the optimal KK computed by the Kalman filter. And that is why I use this equation. In practice the Kalman gain computed by the filter is not the optimal value both because the real world is never truly linear and Gaussian, and because of floating point errors induced by computation. This equation is far less likely to cause the Kalman filter to diverge in the face of real world conditions.
请注意，这个公式适用于所有的 KK 值，而不仅仅是卡尔曼滤波器计算出的最优值 KK 。这也是我使用这个公式的理由。在现实中，卡尔曼滤波器计算出的增益并非最优值：因为现实世界从来都不是完全线性的或符合高斯分布的；同时，计算过程中还会出现浮点数误差。相比而言，这个公式更不容易导致卡尔曼滤波器在现实条件下出现异常行为。

Where did P=(I−KH)P¯P=(I−KH)P¯ come from, then? Let's finish the derivation, which is simple. Recall that the Kalman filter (optimal) gain is given by
那么， P=(I−KH)P¯P=(I−KH)P¯ 是从哪里来的呢？让我们来完成这个简单的推导过程吧。记得，卡尔曼滤波器的最优增益是由以下公式给出的：

K=P¯HT(HP¯HT+R)−1K=P¯HT(HP¯HT+R)−1

Now we substitute this into the equation we just derived:
现在，我们将这个结果代入我们刚刚推导出的方程中：

=(I−KH)P¯(I−KH)T+KRKT=P¯−KHP¯−P¯HTKT+K(HP¯HT+R)KT=P¯−KHP¯−P¯HTKT+P¯HT(HP¯HT+R)−1(HP¯HT+R)KT=P¯−KHP¯−P¯HTKT+P¯HTKT=P¯−KHP¯=(I−KH)P¯=(I−KH)P¯(I−KH)T+KRKT=P¯−KHP¯−P¯HTKT+K(HP¯HT+R)KT=P¯−KHP¯−P¯HTKT+P¯HT(HP¯HT+R)−1(HP¯HT+R)KT=P¯−KHP¯−P¯HTKT+P¯HTKT=P¯−KHP¯=(I−KH)P¯

Therefore P=(I−KH)P¯P=(I−KH)P¯ is mathematically correct when the gain is optimal, but so is (I−KH)P¯(I−KH)T+KRKT(I−KH)P¯(I−KH)T+KRKT. As we already discussed the latter is also correct when the gain is suboptimal, and it is also more numerically stable. Therefore I use this computation in FilterPy.
因此，当增益处于最优值时， P=(I−KH)P¯P=(I−KH)P¯ 在数学上是正确的；不过 (I−KH)P¯(I−KH)T+KRKT(I−KH)P¯(I−KH)T+KRKT 同样也是正确的。正如我们之前所讨论的，即使增益不是最优值， (I−KH)P¯(I−KH)T+KRKT(I−KH)P¯(I−KH)T+KRKT 依然正确，而且其数值稳定性也更高。因此，我在 FilterPy 中使用了这种计算方式。

It is quite possible that your filter still diverges, especially if it runs for hundreds or thousands of epochs. You will need to examine these equations. The literature provides yet other forms of this computation which may be more applicable to your problem. As always, if you are solving real engineering problems where failure could mean loss of equipment or life, you will need to move past this book and into the engineering literature. If you are working with 'toy' problems where failure is not damaging, if you detect divergence you can just reset the value of PP to some 'reasonable' value and keep on going. For example, you could zero out the non diagonal elements so the matrix only contains variances, and then maybe multiply by a constant somewhat larger than one to reflect the loss of information you just injected into the filter. Use your imagination, and test.
很有可能，你的滤波器仍然会出现发散现象，尤其是当运行周期达到数百或数千次时。你需要仔细检查这些方程式。文献中还提供了其他多种计算方法，也许其中有一些更适用于你的问题。当然，如果你正在解决那些一旦出错就会导致设备损坏或人员伤亡的实际工程问题，那么你就需要参考工程领域的专业文献，而不仅仅是这本书的内容。如果你处理的只是些“简单”的问题，且出错不会造成严重后果，那么一旦发现发散现象，你可以将 PP 的值重置为某个“合理”的数值，然后继续计算。例如，你可以将矩阵中的非对角线元素设为零，这样矩阵就只包含方差了；之后，你可以乘以一个略大于一的常数，以弥补因操作而造成的信息损失。发挥你的想象力，多做些测试吧。

Deriving the Kalman Gain Equation
卡尔曼增益方程的推导¶

If you read the last section, you might as well read this one. With this we will have derived the Kalman filter equations.
如果你已经读了上一节的内容，那不妨也把这一节读一读。通过这一节的讲解，我们就已经推导出了卡尔曼滤波器的方程式。

Note that this derivation is not using Bayes equations. I've seen at least four different ways to derive the Kalman filter equations; this derivation is typical to the literature, and follows from the last section. The source is again Brown [4].
请注意，这种推导方式并没有使用贝叶斯定理。据我所知，至少有四种不同的方法可以用来推导卡尔曼滤波器的方程式。这种推导方式在文献中很常见，其逻辑其实源自上一节的论述。该推导方法的来源依然是 Brown[4]。

In the last section we used an unspecified scaling factor KK to derive the Joseph form of the covariance equation. If we want an optimal filter, we need to use calculus to minimize the errors in the equations. You should be familiar with this idea. If you want to find the minimum value of a function f(x)f(x), you take the derivative and set it equal to zero: xdxf(x)=0xdxf(x)=0.
在上一节中，我们使用了某个未具体指定的缩放因子 KK 来推导协方差方程的约瑟夫形式。如果我们想要得到最优的滤波器，就必须利用微积分来最小化方程中的误差。你应该对这个概念很熟悉吧。如果你想找到某个函数 f(x)f(x) 的最小值，只需对该函数求导数，然后令其等于零即可： xdxf(x)=0xdxf(x)=0 。

In our problem the error is expressed by the covariance matrix PP. In particular, the diagonal expresses the error (variance) of each element in the state vector. So, to find the optimal gain we want to take the derivative of the trace (sum) of the diagonal.
在我们的问题中，误差是通过协方差矩阵 PP 来表示的。具体来说，对角线上的元素分别代表了状态向量中各个元素的误差（即方差）。因此，为了找到最优增益，我们需要计算对角线上各元素之和的导数。

Brown reminds us of two formulas involving the derivative of traces:
布朗提到了两个与迹的导数相关的公式：

dtrace(AB)dA=BTdtrace(AB)dA=BT

dtrace(ACAT)dA=2ACdtrace(ACAT)dA=2AC

where ABAB is square and CC is symmetric.
其中， ABAB 为正方形， CC 则具有对称性。

We expand out the Joseph equation to:
我们将 Joseph 方程展开为：

P=P¯−KHP¯−P¯HTKT+K(HP¯HT+R)KTP=P¯−KHP¯−P¯HTKT+K(HP¯HT+R)KT

Now we need to the the derivative of the trace of PP with respect to KK: dtrace(P)dKdtrace(P)dK.
现在，我们需要求出 PP 的迹关于 KK 的导数： dtrace(P)dKdtrace(P)dK 。

The derivative of the trace the first term with respect to KK is 00, since it does not have KK in the expression.
第一项关于 KK 的迹的导数是 00 ，因为在表达式中不包含 KK 。

The derivative of the trace of the second term is (HP¯)T(HP¯)T.
第二项的迹的导数为 (HP¯)T(HP¯)T 。

We can find the derivative of the trace of the third term by noticing that P¯HTKTP¯HTKT is the transpose of KHP¯KHP¯. The trace of a matrix is equal to the trace of it's transpose, so it's derivative will be same as the second term.
我们可以通过观察 P¯HTKTP¯HTKT 实际上是 KHP¯KHP¯ 的转置这一事实，来求出第三项的迹的导数。矩阵的迹等于其转置的迹，因此，第三项的迹的导数与第二项的导数相同。

Finally, the derivative of the trace of the fourth term is 2K(HP¯HT+R)2K(HP¯HT+R).
最后，第四项的迹的导数为 2K(HP¯HT+R)2K(HP¯HT+R) 。

This gives us the final value of
这样我们就得到了最终的数值。

dtrace(P)dK=−2(HP¯)T+2K(HP¯HT+R)dtrace(P)dK=−2(HP¯)T+2K(HP¯HT+R)

We set this to zero and solve to find the equation for KK which minimizes the error:
我们将该值设为零，然后求解方程，从而找到能够最小化误差的 KK 值。

−2(HP¯)T+2K(HP¯HT+R)=0K(HP¯HT+R)=(HP¯)TK(HP¯HT+R)=P¯HTK=P¯HT(HP¯HT+R)−1−2(HP¯)T+2K(HP¯HT+R)=0K(HP¯HT+R)=(HP¯)TK(HP¯HT+R)=P¯HTK=P¯HT(HP¯HT+R)−1

This derivation is not quite iron clad as I left out an argument about why minimizing the trace minimizes the total error, but I think it suffices for this book. Any of the standard texts will go into greater detail if you need it.
这个推导并不完全无懈可击，因为我省略了关于“为何最小化迹值就能最小化总误差”的解释。不过，我觉得对于本书而言，这样的推导已经足够了。如果需要更详细的解释，可以参考各种标准教材。

Numeric Integration of Differential Equations
微分方程的数值积分¶

We've been exposed to several numerical techniques to solve linear differential equations. These include state-space methods, the Laplace transform, and van Loan's method.
我们接触过多种用于求解线性微分方程的数值方法。这些方法包括状态空间法、拉普拉斯变换以及范洛恩法。

These work well for linear ordinary differential equations (ODEs), but do not work well for nonlinear equations. For example, consider trying to predict the position of a rapidly turning car. Cars maneuver by turning the front wheels. This makes them pivot around their rear axle as it moves forward. Therefore the path will be continuously varying and a linear prediction will necessarily produce an incorrect value. If the change in the system is small enough relative to ΔtΔt this can often produce adequate results, but that will rarely be the case with the nonlinear Kalman filters we will be studying in subsequent chapters.
这些方法适用于线性常微分方程的求解，但不适用于非线性方程。例如，试着预测一辆正在急转弯的汽车的位置吧。汽车是通过转动前轮来改变方向的。这样一来，汽车在前进的同时，其车体也会围绕后轴旋转。因此，汽车的行驶路径会不断变化，而线性预测方法必然会得到错误的数值。如果系统中变化的大小相对于某个阈值来说足够小，那么线性预测方法或许还能给出不错的结果。不过，对于我们将在后续章节中研究的非线性卡尔曼滤波器来说，这种情况很少见。

For these reasons we need to know how to numerically integrate ODEs. This can be a vast topic that requires several books. However, I will cover a few simple techniques which will work for a majority of the problems you encounter.
基于这些原因，我们必须掌握如何对常微分方程进行数值积分。这其实是一个相当复杂的主题，需要用好几本书来详细阐述。不过，我在这里会介绍几种简单的技巧，这些技巧足以应对你遇到的大多数问题。

Euler's Method  欧拉法¶

Let's say we have the initial condition problem of
假设我们面临的是这样的初始条件问题：

y′=y,y(0)=1y′=y,y(0)=1

We happen to know the exact answer is y=ety=et because we solved it earlier, but for an arbitrary ODE we will not know the exact solution. In general all we know is the derivative of the equation, which is equal to the slope. We also know the initial value: at t=0t=0, y=1y=1. If we know these two pieces of information we can predict the value at y(t=1)y(t=1) using the slope at t=0t=0 and the value of y(0)y(0). I've plotted this below.
我们恰好知道确切的答案是 y=ety=et ，因为我们之前已经解出了这个方程。但对于一般的常微分方程来说，我们无法知道其确切的解。通常，我们只知道该方程的导数，而导数就相当于函数的斜率。我们还知道初始条件：在 t=0t=0 和 y=1y=1 时的函数值。只要知道了这两项信息，我们就可以利用 t=0t=0 处的斜率以及 y(0)y(0) 处的函数值来预测 y(t=1)y(t=1) 处的函数值。我在下图中绘制了这一关系。

In [14]:  在[14]中：
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

t = np.linspace(-1, 1, 10)
plt.plot(t, np.exp(t))
t = np.linspace(-1, 1, 2)
plt.plot(t,t+1, ls='--', c='k');

You can see that the slope is very close to the curve at t=0.1t=0.1, but far from it at t=1t=1. But let's continue with a step size of 1 for a moment. We can see that at t=1t=1 the estimated value of yy is 2. Now we can compute the value at t=2t=2 by taking the slope of the curve at t=1t=1 and adding it to our initial estimate. The slope is computed with y′=yy′=y, so the slope is 2.
可以看到，在 t=0.1t=0.1 处，曲线的斜率与估计值非常接近；但在 t=1t=1 处，两者相差较大。不过，让我们暂时保持 1 的步长继续计算。在 t=1t=1 处， yy 的估计值为 2。接下来，我们可以通过计算 t=1t=1 处曲线的斜率，再将其加到最初的估计值上，从而得到 t=2t=2 处的值。由于斜率是在 y′=yy′=y 处计算得出的，因此斜率为 2。

In [15]:  在[15]中：
import kf_book.book_plots as book_plots

t = np.linspace(-1, 2, 20)
plt.plot(t, np.exp(t))
t = np.linspace(0, 1, 2)
plt.plot([1, 2, 4], ls='--', c='k')
book_plots.set_labels(x='x', y='y');

Here we see the next estimate for y is 4. The errors are getting large quickly, and you might be unimpressed. But 1 is a very large step size. Let's put this algorithm in code, and verify that it works by using a small step size.
在这里，我们看到 y 的下一個估计值为 4。不过，误差值增长得相当快，这可能会让人觉得不太理想。不过，1 这个步长其实相当大。让我们把这一算法用代码实现出来，然后通过使用较小的步长来验证其是否能够正常工作。

In [16]:  在[16]中：
def euler(t, tmax, y, dx, step=1.):
    ys = []
    while t < tmax:
        y = y + step*dx(t, y)
        ys.append(y)
        t +=step        
    return ys
In [17]:  在[17]中：
def dx(t, y): return y

print(euler(0, 1, 1, dx, step=1.)[-1])
print(euler(0, 2, 1, dx, step=1.)[-1])

2.0
4.0

This looks correct. So now let's plot the result of a much smaller step size.
看起来没问题。那么现在，让我们试着用更小的步长来绘制结果吧。

In [18]:  在[18]中：
ys = euler(0, 4, 1, dx, step=0.00001)
plt.subplot(1,2,1)
plt.title('Computed')
plt.plot(np.linspace(0, 4, len(ys)),ys)
plt.subplot(1,2,2)
t = np.linspace(0, 4, 20)
plt.title('Exact')
plt.plot(t, np.exp(t));
In [19]:  在[19]中：
print('exact answer=', np.exp(4))
print('euler answer=', ys[-1])
print('difference =', np.exp(4) - ys[-1])
print('iterations =', len(ys))

exact answer= 54.598150033144236
euler answer= 54.59705808834125
difference = 0.0010919448029866885
iterations = 400000

Here we see that the error is reasonably small, but it took a very large number of iterations to get three digits of precision. In practice Euler's method is too slow for most problems, and we use more sophisticated methods.
可以看出，这里的误差相当小，但为了获得三位数的精确度，需要大量的迭代次数。实际上，对于大多数问题来说，欧拉方法的计算速度太慢了，因此我们通常会使用更复杂的方法来解决问题。

Before we go on, let's formally derive Euler's method, as it is the basis for the more advanced Runge Kutta methods used in the next section. In fact, Euler's method is the simplest form of Runge Kutta.
在继续之前，让我们先正式推导一下欧拉方法。因为欧拉方法是后文将要介绍的更复杂的龙格-库塔方法的基础。实际上，欧拉方法就是龙格-库塔方法中最简单的形式。

Here are the first 3 terms of the Taylor expansion of yy. An infinite expansion would give an exact answer, so O(h4)O(h4) denotes the error due to the finite expansion.
以下是 yy 的泰勒展开式的前 3 项。如果进行无限项展开，就能得到精确的答案；而 O(h4)O(h4) 则代表了由于有限项展开而产生的误差。

y(t0+h)=y(t0)+hy′(t0)+12!h2y′′(t0)+13!h3y′′′(t0)+O(h4)y(t0+h)=y(t0)+hy′(t0)+12!h2y″(t0)+13!h3y‴(t0)+O(h4)

Here we can see that Euler's method is using the first two terms of the Taylor expansion. Each subsequent term is smaller than the previous terms, so we are assured that the estimate will not be too far off from the correct value.
可以看出，欧拉法实际上运用了泰勒展开式的前两项。后续的各项都比前面的项要小，因此我们可以确信，该估算值与真实值的偏差不会太大。

Runge Kutta Methods  龙格-库塔法¶

Runge Kutta is the workhorse of numerical integration. There are a vast number of methods in the literature. In practice, using the Runge Kutta algorithm that I present here will solve most any problem you will face. It offers a very good balance of speed, precision, and stability, and it is the 'go to' numerical integration method unless you have a very good reason to choose something different.
龙格-库塔法是数值积分领域中最常用的方法。文献中介绍了无数种数值积分方法。在实际应用中，使用我在这里介绍的龙格-库塔算法，几乎可以解决所有遇到的问题。该算法在速度、精度和稳定性方面都取得了很好的平衡。除非有充分的理由选择其他方法，否则龙格-库塔法都是最理想的数值积分方法。

Let's dive in. We start with some differential equation
让我们开始吧。首先从一些微分方程入手。

y¨=ddty˙y¨=ddty˙
.

We can substitute the derivative of y with a function f, like so
我们可以用函数 f 来表示 y 的导数，具体如下：

y¨=ddtf(y,t)y¨=ddtf(y,t)
.

Deriving these equations is outside the scope of this book, but the Runge Kutta RK4 method is defined with these equations.
推导这些方程超出了本书的讨论范围，不过龙格-库塔 RK4 方法正是基于这些方程而定义的。

y(t+Δt)=y(t)+16(k1+2k2+2k3+k4)+O(Δt4)y(t+Δt)=y(t)+16(k1+2k2+2k3+k4)+O(Δt4)

k1k2k3k4=f(y,t)Δt=f(y+12k1,t+12Δt)Δt=f(y+12k2,t+12Δt)Δt=f(y+k3,t+Δt)Δtk1=f(y,t)Δtk2=f(y+12k1,t+12Δt)Δtk3=f(y+12k2,t+12Δt)Δtk4=f(y+k3,t+Δt)Δt

Here is the corresponding code:
以下是相应的代码：

In [20]:  在[20]中：
def runge_kutta4(y, x, dx, f):
    """computes 4th order Runge-Kutta for dy/dx.
    y is the initial value for y
    x is the initial value for x
    dx is the difference in x (e.g. the time step)
    f is a callable function (y, x) that you supply 
    to compute dy/dx for the specified values.
    """
    
    k1 = dx * f(y, x)
    k2 = dx * f(y + 0.5*k1, x + 0.5*dx)
    k3 = dx * f(y + 0.5*k2, x + 0.5*dx)
    k4 = dx * f(y + k3, x + dx)
    
    return y + (k1 + 2*k2 + 2*k3 + k4) / 6.

Let's use this for a simple example. Let
我们用这个来举个简单的例子吧。假设……

y˙=ty(t)−−−√y˙=ty(t)

with the initial values
以初始值为准/以初始条件开始

t0y0=0=y(t0)=1t0=0y0=y(t0)=1

In [21]:  在[21]中：
import math
import numpy as np
t = 0.
y = 1.
dt = .1

ys, ts = [], []

def func(y,t):
    return t*math.sqrt(y)

while t <= 10:
    y = runge_kutta4(y, t, dt, func)
    t += dt
    ys.append(y)
    ts.append(t)

exact = [(t**2 + 4)**2 / 16. for t in ts]
plt.plot(ts, ys)
plt.plot(ts, exact)

error = np.array(exact) - np.array(ys)
print(f"max error {max(error):.5f}")

max error 0.00005

Bayesian Filtering  贝叶斯滤波¶

Starting in the Discrete Bayes chapter I used a Bayesian formulation for filtering. Suppose we are tracking an object. We define its state at a specific time as its position, velocity, and so on. For example, we might write the state at time tt as xt=[xtx˙t]Txt=[xtx˙t]T.
从“离散贝叶斯”这一章开始，我采用了贝叶斯方法来进行数据处理。假设我们正在追踪某个物体。我们可以将该物体在某一特定时刻的状态定义为它的位置、速度等信息。例如，我们可以将时间点 tt 时的物体状态表示为 xt=[xtx˙t]Txt=[xtx˙t]T 。

When we take a measurement of the object we are measuring the state or part of it. Sensors are noisy, so the measurement is corrupted with noise. Clearly though, the measurement is determined by the state. That is, a change in state may change the measurement, but a change in measurement will not change the state.
当我们测量某个物体时，实际上是在测量该物体的状态或其中的一部分。由于传感器的存在，测量结果会受到噪声的干扰。不过，测量结果终究是由物体的状态所决定的。也就是说，物体状态的变化会影响到测量结果，但测量结果的变化则不会改变物体的状态。

In filtering our goal is to compute an optimal estimate for a set of states x0:tx0:t from time 0 to time tt. If we knew x0:tx0:t then it would be trivial to compute a set of measurements z0:tz0:t corresponding to those states. However, we receive a set of measurements z0:tz0:t, and want to compute the corresponding states x0:tx0:t. This is called statistical inversion because we are trying to compute the input from the output.
在过滤处理过程中，我们的目标是计算从时间 0 到时间 tt 期间，各状态 x0:tx0:t 的最优估计值。如果我们知道 x0:tx0:t 的值，那么计算出与这些状态相对应的测量值 z0:tz0:t 就很简单了。但实际上，我们只能得到一组测量值 z0:tz0:t ，而需要计算出与之对应的状态 x0:tx0:t 。这一过程被称为“统计反演”，因为我们试图从输出结果来反推输入值。

Inversion is a difficult problem because there is typically no unique solution. For a given set of states x0:tx0:t there is only one possible set of measurements (plus noise), but for a given set of measurements there are many different sets of states that could have led to those measurements.
反演是一个棘手的问题，因为通常不存在唯一的解决方案。对于给定的一组状态 x0:tx0:t ，只有一组可能的测量结果（再加上噪声），但对于给定的一组测量结果来说，却有可能有多种不同的状态组合导致了这些测量结果。

Recall Bayes Theorem:  回顾贝叶斯定理：

P(x∣z)=P(z∣x)P(x)P(z)P(x∣z)=P(z∣x)P(x)P(z)

where P(z∣x)P(z∣x) is the likelihood of the measurement zz, P(x)P(x) is the prior based on our process model, and P(z)P(z) is a normalization constant. P(x∣z)P(x∣z) is the posterior, or the distribution after incorporating the measurement zz, also called the evidence.
其中， P(z∣x)P(z∣x) 表示对测量结果 zz 的置信度； P(x)P(x) 则基于我们的过程模型所得出的先验概率； P(z)P(z) 是一个归一化常数。 P(x∣z)P(x∣z) 表示后验概率，也就是在考虑了测量结果 zz 之后的概率分布，这一结果也被称为“证据”。

This is a statistical inversion as it goes from P(z∣x)P(z∣x) to P(x∣z)P(x∣z). The solution to our filtering problem can be expressed as:
这是一种统计上的反演过程，即从 P(z∣x)P(z∣x) 状态转变为 P(x∣z)P(x∣z) 状态。我们这个过滤问题的解决方案可以表示为：

P(x0:t∣z0:t)=P(z0:t∣x0:t)P(x0:t)P(z0:t)P(x0:t∣z0:t)=P(z0:t∣x0:t)P(x0:t)P(z0:t)

That is all well and good until the next measurement zt+1zt+1 comes in, at which point we need to recompute the entire expression for the range 0:t+10:t+1.
一切都很好，直到下一次测量结果 zt+1zt+1 出来为止。一旦有了新的测量数据，我们就需要重新计算整个区间 0:t+10:t+1 内的数值。

In practice this is intractable because we are trying to compute the posterior distribution P(x0:t∣z0:t)P(x0:t∣z0:t) for the state over the full range of time steps. But do we really care about the probability distribution at the third step (say) when we just received the tenth measurement? Not usually. So we relax our requirements and only compute the distributions for the current time step.
实际上，这很难实现，因为我们试图计算整个时间范围内状态的后验概率分布。但是，当我们刚刚获得第十次测量结果时，我们真的需要知道第三步的状态概率分布吗？通常情况下并不需要。因此，我们放宽了要求，只计算当前时间步的状态概率分布即可。

The first simplification is we describe our process (e.g., the motion model for a moving object) as a Markov chain. That is, we say that the current state is solely dependent on the previous state and a transition probability P(xk∣xk−1)P(xk∣xk−1), which is just the probability of going from the last state to the current one. We write:
第一个简化步骤是：我们将所描述的过程（比如，运动物体的运动模型）视为一个马尔可夫链。也就是说，当前状态完全取决于上一个状态以及一个转移概率 P(xk∣xk−1)P(xk∣xk−1) ，该转移概率指的是从上一个状态转移到当前状态的概率。我们将其表示为：

xk∼P(xk∣xk−1)xk∼P(xk∣xk−1)

In practice this is extremely reasonable, as many things have the Markov property. If you are driving in a parking lot, does your position in the next second depend on whether you pulled off the interstate or were creeping along on a dirt road one minute ago? No. Your position in the next second depends solely on your current position, speed, and control inputs, not on what happened a minute ago. Thus, cars have the Markov property, and we can make this simplification with no loss of precision or generality.
实际上，这种做法是完全合理的，因为很多事物都具备马尔可夫性质。比如，当你在停车场驾驶时，下一秒你的位置是否取决于你一分钟前是在高速公路上行驶，还是在土路上行驶呢？并不然。下一秒你的位置完全取决于你当前的位置、速度以及操控方式，而与一分钟前发生的事情无关。因此，汽车也具备马尔可夫性质，我们可以进行这样的简化处理，而不会损失任何精度或普遍性。

The next simplification we make is do define the measurement model as depending on the current state xkxk with the conditional probability of the measurement given the current state: P(zk∣xk)P(zk∣xk). We write:
我们接下来的简化步骤是：将测量模型定义为取决于当前状态 xkxk ，同时考虑在给定当前状态的情况下进行测量的条件概率 P(zk∣xk)P(zk∣xk) 。我们表示为：

zk∼P(zk∣xk)zk∼P(zk∣xk)

We have a recurrence now, so we need an initial condition to terminate it. Therefore we say that the initial distribution is the probablity of the state x0x0:
现在出现了循环现象，因此我们需要一个初始条件来终止这种循环。所以，我们可以说，初始分布其实就是状态 x0x0 出现的概率。

x0∼P(x0)x0∼P(x0)

These terms are plugged into Bayes equation. If we have the state x0x0 and the first measurement we can estimate P(x1|z1)P(x1|z1). The motion model creates the prior P(x2∣x1)P(x2∣x1). We feed this back into Bayes theorem to compute P(x2|z2)P(x2|z2). We continue this predictor-corrector algorithm, recursively computing the state and distribution at time tt based solely on the state and distribution at time t−1t−1 and the measurement at time tt.
这些参数被代入贝叶斯方程中。如果我们知道初始状态 x0x0 以及第一次测量结果，就可以估算出状态 P(x1|z1)P(x1|z1) 。运动模型则用于确定先验概率 P(x2∣x1)P(x2∣x1) 。我们将这些数值代入贝叶斯定理中，从而计算出状态 P(x2|z2)P(x2|z2) 。我们不断重复这个预测-修正过程，仅根据时间点 t−1t−1 的状态和分布以及时间点 tt 的测量结果，来递归地计算出时间点 tt 的状态和分布。

The details of the mathematics for this computation varies based on the problem. The Discrete Bayes and Univariate Kalman Filter chapters gave two different formulations which you should have been able to reason through. The univariate Kalman filter assumes that for a scalar state both the noise and process are linear model are affected by zero-mean, uncorrelated Gaussian noise.
这种计算所涉及的数学细节因具体问题而异。在“离散贝叶斯滤波”和“单变量卡尔曼滤波”这两章中，分别给出了两种不同的计算公式，你应该能够理解其中的原理。单变量卡尔曼滤波假设：对于标量状态而言，无论是噪声还是系统本身的行为，都受到均值为零、相互不相关的高斯噪声的影响。

The Multivariate Kalman filter makes the same assumption but for states and measurements that are vectors, not scalars. Dr. Kalman was able to prove that if these assumptions hold true then the Kalman filter is optimal in a least squares sense. Colloquially this means there is no way to derive more information from the noisy measurements. In the remainder of the book I will present filters that relax the constraints on linearity and Gaussian noise.
多元卡尔曼滤波器也基于同样的假设，只不过这里的“状态”和“测量值”都是向量，而非标量。卡尔曼博士证明了：只要这些假设成立，卡尔曼滤波器就具有最小二乘意义上的最优性。通俗来说，这意味着我们无法从这些有噪声的测量数据中获取更多信息。在本书的后续部分，我将介绍那些不那么严格限制线性条件和高斯噪声假设的滤波器。

Before I go on, a few more words about statistical inversion. As Calvetti and Somersalo write in Introduction to Bayesian Scientific Computing, "we adopt the Bayesian point of view: randomness simply means lack of information"[3]. Our state parameterizes physical phenomena that we could in principle measure or compute: velocity, air drag, and so on. We lack enough information to compute or measure their value, so we opt to consider them as random variables. Strictly speaking they are not random, thus this is a subjective position.
在继续之前，我想再谈谈关于统计反演的问题。正如 Calvetti 和 Somersalo 在《贝叶斯科学计算导论》中所写的那样：“我们采用贝叶斯视角：所谓‘随机性’，其实只是意味着信息的缺失而已”[3]。状态参数用来描述那些原则上可以被测量或计算出来的物理现象：比如速度、空气阻力等等。由于我们缺乏足够的信息来精确计算或测量这些数值，因此我们把它们视为随机变量。严格来说，它们并非真正的随机变量，所以这种看法其实是一种主观判断。

They devote a full chapter to this topic. I can spare a paragraph. Bayesian filters are possible because we ascribe statistical properties to unknown parameters. In the case of the Kalman filter we have closed-form solutions to find an optimal estimate. Other filters, such as the discrete Bayes filter or the particle filter which we cover in a later chapter, model the probability in a more ad-hoc, non-optimal manner. The power of our technique comes from treating lack of information as a random variable, describing that random variable as a probability distribution, and then using Bayes Theorem to solve the statistical inference problem.
他们专门用了一整章的篇幅来讨论这个主题。我则只需用一段文字来说明即可。贝叶斯滤波之所以可行，是因为我们将统计特性赋予了那些未知的参数。在卡尔曼滤波中，我们可以得到用于确定最优估计的精确解。而其他滤波方法，比如离散贝叶斯滤波或粒子滤波（我们将在后面的章节中详细介绍），则是以一种更为复杂的、非最优的方式来处理概率问题。我们这种方法的优点在于：它把信息的缺失视为一个随机变量，用概率分布来描述这个随机变量，然后再利用贝叶斯定理来解决统计推断问题。

Converting Kalman Filter to a g-h Filter
将卡尔曼滤波器转换为 g-h 滤波器¶

I've stated that the Kalman filter is a form of the g-h filter. It just takes some algebra to prove it. It's more straightforward to do with the one dimensional case, so I will do that. Recall
我之前说过，卡尔曼滤波其实是一种 g-h 滤波的特例。只需通过一些代数运算就能证明这一点。在一维情况下，这种证明更为简单，所以我将用一维情况来举例说明。请回忆一下。

μx=σ21μ2+σ22μ1σ21+σ22μx=σ12μ2+σ22μ1σ12+σ22

which I will make more friendly for our eyes as:
我会让它们看起来更美观一些，具体如下：

μx=ya+xba+bμx=ya+xba+b

We can easily put this into the g-h form with the following algebra
我们可以通过以下代数运算，轻松将其转化为 g-h 形式。

μxμxμxμxμx=(x−x)+ya+xba+b=x−a+ba+bx+ya+xba+b=x+−x(a+b)+xb+yaa+b=x+−xa+yaa+b=x+aa+b(y−x)μx=(x−x)+ya+xba+bμx=x−a+ba+bx+ya+xba+bμx=x+−x(a+b)+xb+yaa+bμx=x+−xa+yaa+bμx=x+aa+b(y−x)

We are almost done, but recall that the variance of estimate is given by
我们差不多完成了，但请记住，估计值的方差是由以下公式给出的。

σ2x=11σ21+1σ22=11a+1bσx2=11σ12+1σ22=11a+1b

We can incorporate that term into our equation above by observing that
我们可以通过观察发现，可以将那个术语纳入到上面的方程式中。

aa+b=a/a(a+b)/a=1(a+b)/a=11+ba=1bb+ba=1b11b+1a=σ2xbaa+b=a/a(a+b)/a=1(a+b)/a=11+ba=1bb+ba=1b11b+1a=σx2b

We can tie all of this together with
我们可以把这一切联系起来。

μx=x+aa+b(y−x)=x+σ2xb(y−x)=x+gn(y−x)μx=x+aa+b(y−x)=x+σx2b(y−x)=x+gn(y−x)

where  在……的地方/在何处

gn=σ2xσ2ygn=σx2σy2

The end result is multiplying the residual of the two measurements by a constant and adding to our previous value, which is the gg equation for the g-h filter. gg is the variance of the new estimate divided by the variance of the measurement. Of course in this case gg is not a constant as it varies with each time step as the variance changes. We can also derive the formula for hh in the same way. It is not a particularly illuminating derivation and I will skip it. The end result is
最终的计算方法是：将两次测量所得的残差乘以一个常数，然后将其加到之前的数值上。这就是 g-h 滤波器的 gg 公式。 gg 则是指新估计值的方差除以测量值的方差。当然，在这种情况下， gg 并非恒定值，因为它会随着每个时间步长的变化而变化。我们也可以用同样的方法推导出 hh 的公式。不过，这个推导过程并不太复杂，我就不详细介绍了。最终的结果就是……

hn=COV(x,x˙)σ2yhn=COV(x,x˙)σy2

The takeaway point is that gg and hh are specified fully by the variance and covariances of the measurement and predictions at time nn. In other words, we are picking a point between the measurement and prediction by a scale factor determined by the quality of each of those two inputs.
关键在于： gg 和 hh 的值完全由在时间点 nn 时的测量值和预测值的方差及协方差来决定。换句话说，我们是通过一个由这两个输入数据的质量所决定的比例因子，来在测量值和预测值之间选择一个点。

References  参考文献¶

  • [1] C.B. Molwer and C.F. Van Loan "Nineteen Dubious Ways to Compute the Exponential of a Matrix, Twenty-Five Years Later,", SIAM Review 45, 3-49. 2003.
    [1] C.B. Molwer 和 C.F. Van Loan：“二十五年后，计算矩阵指数的十九种可疑方法”，《SIAM 评论》第 45 卷，第 3-49 页，2003 年。

  • [2] C.F. van Loan, "Computing Integrals Involving the Matrix Exponential," IEEE Transactions Automatic Control, June 1978.
    [2] C.F. van Loan，《涉及矩阵指数的积分计算》，《IEEE 自动控制汇刊》，1978 年 6 月。

  • [3] Calvetti, D and Somersalo E, "Introduction to Bayesian Scientific Computing: Ten Lectures on Subjective Computing,", Springer, 2007.
    [3] Calvetti, D.和 Somersalo, E.，《贝叶斯科学计算导论：关于主观计算的十讲》，施普林格出版社，2007 年。

  • [4] Brown, R. G. and Hwang, P. Y.C., "Introduction to Random Signals and Applied Kalman Filtering", Wiley and Sons, Fourth Edition, p.143-147, 2012.
    [4] Brown, R. G.和 Hwang, P. Y.C.著，《随机信号与卡尔曼滤波应用导论》，Wiley and Sons 出版社，第四版，第 143-147 页，2012 年。

This website does not host notebooks, it only renders notebooks available on other websites.
